dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped 40-day high/low lookback to Donchian Channel upper/lower bounds (dc_upper, dc_lower). Exit conditions use 20-day Donchian, which is a common alternative — note that the allowed indicator list does not include parameterized Donchian channels (e.g., dc_upper_20), so this uses the standard dc_upper and dc_lower. For precise 20-day exit logic, consider adding dc_upper_20 and dc_lower_20 to the allowed indicators list. Entry is bidirectional: LONG on high breakout, SHORT on low breakdown. Exit reverses the position.

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped 40-day high/low lookback to Donchian Channel upper/lower bounds (dc_upper, dc_lower). Exit conditions use 20-day Donchian, which is a common alternative — note that the allowed indicator list does not include parameterized Donchian channels (e.g., dc_upper_20), so this uses the standard dc_upper and dc_lower. For precise 20-day exit logic, consider adding dc_upper_20 and dc_lower_20 to the allowed indicators list. Entry is bidirectional: LONG on high breakout, SHORT on low breakdown. Exit reverses the position.

source_rule_text: Buy when today's high exceeds the high of the past 40 days; sell short when today's low falls below the low of the past 40 days; exit longs when today's low falls below the low of the past 20 days; exit shorts when today's high exceeds the high of the past 20 days.
